extensions.name: Gallery
extensions.description: Photo gallery with street/studio tagging, admin collection view, and public list/detail pages.
extensions.author: kuosuko

extensions.name: Blog
extensions.description: Declarative port of the code `posts` extension: draft/published blog posts with public list + detail pages, running on the generic content engine.
extensions.author: kuosuko

requires.reason: Minute-precision scheduled publishing (core lazy sweep remains the fallback)

extensions.name: Contact
extensions.description: Have questions? Leave a message and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
extensions.author: kuosuko

extensions.name: Cron
extensions.description: Minute-precision scheduled task trigger: an external companion worker drives core's task expiration scan via signed callback.
extensions.author: kuosuko

extensions.name: Google Login
extensions.description: Sign in with Google (OIDC). Unlinked identities register as guest; existing users can link from their account page.
extensions.author: kuosuko

extensions.name: LINE Login
extensions.description: Sign in with LINE (OIDC). The email scope requires LINE review; without it users get a placeholder address and can add a real one later.
extensions.author: kuosuko

extensions.name: NewebPay 藍新金流
extensions.description: NewebPay payment provider (MPG): test/production dual environment, form-post MPG checkout, idempotent Notify verification and settlement, ReturnURL result page. Adapter mounted on core payment-kit engine.
extensions.author: kuosuko
